ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defenseman, Goalie) */,
  "career_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player in their career */,
  "career_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in their career */,
  "career_penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties incurred by the player in their career */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2017-2018) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., QBAAA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* League's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* League's contact email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season-stat record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points per game scored by the player in the season */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties incurred by the player in the season */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player in the season */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "time_on_ice" TEXT /* Total time on ice by the player */,
  "goalie_save_percentage" REAL /* Save percentage for goalies */,
  "goalie_goals_against_average" REAL /* Goals against average for goalies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Team's contact email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the team in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team in the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
